ThingDef.label: archotech shard
ThingDef.description: A fragment cut from a larger archotech part without waking whatever runs inside it. It stays faintly warm, closes its own cuts, and gives up nothing under a microscope. Enough of them, reassembled with enough patience, will hold the shape of a working archotech part.

RecipeDef.label: assemble archotech arm
RecipeDef.description: Assemble an archotech arm from archotech shards.

RecipeDef.label: break down archotech arm
RecipeDef.description: Break an archotech arm down into archotech shards.

RecipeDef.label: assemble archotech leg
RecipeDef.description: Assemble an archotech leg from archotech shards.

RecipeDef.label: break down archotech leg
RecipeDef.description: Break an archotech leg down into archotech shards.

RecipeDef.description: Assemble an archotech eye from archotech shards.

RecipeDef.description: Break an archotech eye down into archotech shards.
